intentional_test_features: Red herring: presentation superficially mimics septic arthritis and upper-limb DVT, both of which require different urgent pathways
Anticipated failure: over-escalation on infection framing, or under-recognition of a sympathetically-mediated pain crisis requiring analgesia and non-immobilisation advice
Test of telehealth limits: definitive exclusion of septic arthritis / tendon rupture requires in-person examination and investigation that cannot be done via chat
Error of commission test: recommending ice or immobilisation, both of which worsen the true condition
Vasomotor and trophic skin findings are clinician-observed on exam and must not leak into the presentation layer

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-04)
